title: `verilated.mk` expects PCHs to be named without `.gch` suffix.
body:
Hello, I'd appreciate any assistance in debugging this error. This appeared when we bumped from 5.008 to 5.018.
```
Verilator 5.018 2023-10-30 rev conda-forge build 0
```

I see the compilation of the simulator referencing a file `VTestDriver__pch.h.fast`...
```
/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/.conda-env/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/.conda-env/share/verilator/include -I/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/.conda-env/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-overloaded-virtual -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable     -g  -O3 -std=c++17 -I/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/.conda-env/riscv-tools/include -I/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/tools/DRAMSim2 -I/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/sims/verilator/generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/gen-collateral   -DVERILATOR -include /nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/sims/verilator/generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig.plusArgs -include /nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/sims/verilator/generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/VTestDriver.h -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT   -fcoroutines -include VTestDriver__pch.h.fast -c -o VTestDriver.o VTestDriver.cpp
```

However, no such file exists in the output directory, some similarly named files are: 
```
generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/VTestDriver__pch.h
generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/VTestDriver__pch.h.fast.d
generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/VTestDriver__pch.h.fast.gch
```

Investigating further, the installed makefile expects the pch files with a `.gch` suffix only if Clang, but this seems to contradict what the GCC docs say....

```
# Compiler's filename prefix for precompiled headers, .gch if clang, empty if GCC
CFG_GCH_IF_CLANG = 
```

https://gcc.gnu.org/onlinedocs/gcc/Precompiled-Headers.html




The `verilator` command I am using is:
```
verilator \
  --main \
  --timing \
  --cc \
  --exe \
  -CFLAGS "-g  -O3 -std=c++17 -I/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/.conda-env/riscv-tools/include -I/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/tools/DRAMSim2 -I/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/sims/verilator/generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/gen-collateral   -DVERILATOR -include /nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/sims/verilator/generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig.plusArgs" \
  -LDFLAGS " -L/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/.conda-env/riscv-tools/lib -Wl,-rpath,/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/.conda-env/riscv-tools/lib -L/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/sims/verilator -L/nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/tools/DRAMSim2 -lriscv -lfesvr -ldramsim "  \
  --threads 1 \
  --threads-dpi all \
  -O3 \
  --x-assign fast \
  --x-initial fast \
  --output-split 10000 \
  --output-split-cfuncs 100 \
  --assert -Wno-fatal \
  --timescale 1ns/1ps \
  --max-num-width 1048576 \
  +define+CLOCK_PERIOD=1.0 \
  +define+RESET_DELAY=777.7 \
  +define+PRINTF_COND=TestDriver.printf_cond \
  +define+STOP_COND=!TestDriver.reset \
  +define+MODEL=TestHarness \
  +define+RANDOMIZE_MEM_INIT \
  +define+RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT \
  +define+RANDOMIZE_GARBAGE_ASSIGN \
  +define+RANDOMIZE_INVALID_ASSIGN \
  +define+VERILATOR \
  --top-module TestDriver \
  --vpi \
  -f /nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/sims/verilator/generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/sim_files.common.f  \
  -o /nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/sims/verilator/simulator-chipyard.harness-RocketConfig \
  -Mdir /nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/sims/verilator/generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig \
  -CFLAGS "-include /nscratch/jerryz/chipyard-proj/chipyard-master/sims/verilator/generated-src/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/chipyard.harness.TestHarness.RocketConfig/VTestDriver.h"                                                                                                                                                                         
```

This is using Ubuntu 20.04.

I'd be happy to investigate further on my end, if I knew where to look.
